reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. La honestidad del playero que nos atendió, en el apuro se quedó la tarjeta de crédito, fuimos a preguntar si estaba y la tenían guardada.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The attendant who served us was very honest; in our haste, we forgot our credit card, so we went to ask if it was still there and they had it safely stored.
